executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Python FastAPI backend on port 8000 in Docker. API prefix: /api/v1/. Health: GET /api/v1/health. Login: POST /api/v1/auth/login with JSON {username, password}. Admin user: username=admin. Uses PostgreSQL. CSRF protection on mutating requests via X-CSRF-Token header. Test the API endpoints directly with HTTP requests, not browser-based tests.
